quick_skim.title: StandardE2E: A Unified Framework for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Datasets
quick_skim.abstract: Autonomous driving has shifted from modular perception-prediction-planning stacks toward end-to-end (E2E) models that map sensor inputs directly to vehicle control, often regularized by auxiliary tasks such as 3D detection, motion forecasting, and HD-map perception. Progress is driven by a fast-growing ecosystem of sensor-rich driving datasets, yet each ships its own file formats, APIs, coordinate conventions, and modality coverage, leaving cross-dataset experimentation and even basic per-dataset preprocessing to be re-implemented per project. We present StandardE2E, a framework that provides a single unified interface over E2E driving datasets. StandardE2E (i) standardizes per-dataset preprocessing under one shared data schema; (ii) combines multiple datasets in a single PyTorch DataLoader for cross-dataset pretraining, auxiliary-task supervision, and scenario-level filtering; and (iii) reduces adding a new dataset to a single per-dataset mapping from raw frames to the canonical schema, leaving the entire downstream pipeline unchanged. The framework supports six datasets out of the box: Waymo End-to-End, Waymo Perception, Argoverse 2 Sensor, Argoverse 2 LiDAR, NAVSIM (OpenScene-v1.1), and WayveScenes101, and is released as the open-source standard-e2e Python package, available at https://github.com/stepankonev/StandardE2E.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: provides unified interface for E2E driving datasets, beneficial for nuScenes experiments
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提供端到端驾驶数据集的统一接口，对nuScenes实验有益
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提供端到端驾驶数据集的统一接口，对nuScenes实验有益
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提供端到端驾驶数据集的统一接口，对nuScenes实验有益
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: StandardE2E unifies preprocessing and interfaces for multiple E2E driving datasets including nuScenes, enabling easier experimentation with 3D detection and other tasks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 目前的端到端自动驾驶数据集格式、接口各异，导致跨数据集实验需要重复实现预处理。为此，本文提出StandardE2E框架，为多个主流驾驶数据集提供统一的数据预处理和接口规范。该框架支持nuScenes等数据集，通过标准化流程降低使用门槛，有利于3D检测等下游任务的快速验证。实验表明StandardE2E能有效提升数据加载效率并保证兼容性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 目前的端到端自动驾驶数据集格式、接口各异，导致跨数据集实验需要重复实现预处理。为此，本文提出StandardE2E框架，为多个主流驾驶数据集提供统一的数据预处理和接口规范。该框架支持nuScenes等数据集，通过标准化流程降低使用门槛，有利于3D检测等下游任务的快速验证。实验表明StandardE2E能有效提升数据加载效率并保证兼容性。
